channel.title: Sport Tourism on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Sport Tourism on Bali Kini

item.title: Penglipu-Run 2026: A 5KM Race Through the World's Best Tourism Village
item.description:
Penglipuran Tourism Village in Bangli Regency, Bali, is set to become a world-class sport tourism stage on Saturday, June 7, 2026, as hundreds of runners weave through its iconic bamboo corridors during the Penglipu-Run Fun Run 2026. This 5-kilometer event is designed to blend sport, natural beauty, and Balinese cultural heritage into an unforgettable running experience.

A World’s Best Tourism Village Becomes a Running Arena

Penglipuran is no ordinary village. It has been recognized by the United Nations World Tourism Organization (UNWTO) as one of 54 Best Tourism Villages in the world in 2023 — joining leading tourism villages from across the globe. This international recognition places Penglipuran among Indonesia’s most prized destinations.

item.title: Penglipu-Run 2026: Lari 5KM di Hutan Bambu Desa Terbaik Dunia
item.description:
Desa Wisata Penglipuran di Kabupaten Bangli, Bali, akan menjadi panggung sport tourism kelas dunia pada Sabtu, 7 Juni 2026, saat ribuan langkah kaki menembus lorong bambu yang ikonik dalam ajang Penglipu-Run Fun Run 2026. Event 5 kilometer ini dirancang untuk memadukan olahraga, keindahan alam, dan kekayaan budaya Bali dalam satu pengalaman berlari yang tak terlupakan.

Desa Wisata Terbaik Dunia Jadi Arena Lari

Penglipuran bukan desa biasa. Desa ini telah diakui oleh United Nations World Tourism Organization (UNWTO) sebagai salah satu dari 54 Best Tourism Villages terbaik dunia pada 2023 — bergabung bersama desa-desa wisata unggulan dari seluruh penjuru dunia. Pengakuan internasional ini menjadikan Penglipuran sebagai salah satu destinasi paling berharga di Indonesia.

item.title: Jatiluwih Festival 2026: Lari 5K di Tengah Sawah Warisan UNESCO
item.description:
Lari Sambil Nikmati Keindahan Sawah Warisan Dunia

Bali kembali menghadirkan event sport tourism yang memadukan olahraga dengan wisata alam. Jatiluwih Festival VII & Bali Tourism Run 2026 siap digelar pada 20-21 Juni 2026 di kawasan Daya Tarik Wisata (DTW) Jatiluwih, Desa Penebel, Kabupaten Tabanan — tepat di jantung hamparan sawah terasering yang telah diakui sebagai Warisan Budaya Dunia UNESCO.

Acara ini bukan sekadar lomba lari biasa. Peserta diajak untuk berlari sejauh 5 kilometer menyusuri jalan setapak berlatar belakang sawah terasering ikonik Jatiluwih, menikmati udara segar pegunungan Tabanan, dan merasakan langsung keindahan lanskap pertanian tradisional subak yang telah bertahan selama ratusan tahun.

item.title: Jatiluwih Festival 2026: Run 5K Through UNESCO Heritage Rice Terraces
item.description:
Running Through a World Heritage Landscape

Bali is set to host one of its most unique sport tourism events of the year. Jatiluwih Festival VII & Bali Tourism Run 2026 is scheduled for June 20-21, 2026 at the Jatiluwih Tourist Attraction Area (DTW), in Penebel Village, Tabanan Regency — right in the heart of the iconic rice terraces recognized as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site.

This is no ordinary race. Participants will run 5 kilometers along specially designed trails winding through Jatiluwih’s legendary stepped rice fields, breathing in the crisp mountain air of Tabanan, and experiencing firsthand the stunning agricultural landscape built on centuries of traditional Balinese subak irrigation practices.
